body.title: Create /goal skill — define and manage G-xxx goals
body.result: Created /goal skill — new/list/update/block/retire commands, G-xxx IDs, adc.palace storage
body.description:
No goal layer exists above decisions. /goal creates G-xxx records with all fields needed for auditing and hypothesis linkage. Goals stored in adc.palace as palace.goals.* nodes.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/goal/SKILL.md (new), palace storage via existing palace_write
**Design rules:** palace-first; no new DB tables — goals live in adc.palace with node_type='goal'
**Scope boundary:** in scope: /goal create (target, KRs, time-horizon, why-now, tensions, falsification-condition), /goal update, /goal list (active/blocked/retired), /goal retire, /goal block G-xxx --until G-yyy. Out of scope: auto-linking decisions to goals (that's /decided's job), goal KR auto-update (that's /outcome's job).
**Test plan:** no automated tests for skill files; manual smoke: create a goal, list it, block it, verify palace node written correctly.
